leads.title: Gates of Despair
leads.author: CN Entertainment
leads.pitch_sfx: His punchy SFX would provide the visceral impact needed for a horror game's jump scares and environmental interactions, while his atmospheric sound design would build dread and immersion.
leads.pitch_music: The composer's heavy metalcore and doom metal styles perfectly align with the brooding, oppressive atmosphere of a horror title, enhancing tension and player fear.
leads.reason: This horror game offers a strong opportunity for both atmospheric and punchy sound design, as well as heavy, tension-building music that aligns perfectly with the sound designer's core specialties.

leads.title: The Crimson Hunt
leads.author: Farelas
leads.description: The hunter Victoria works in the shadows, eliminating the last remnants of the vampire bloodlines.
leads.pitch_sfx: His atmospheric and punchy sound design would perfectly capture the brooding tension and visceral combat of a vampire hunter.
leads.pitch_music: The composer's expertise in dark, heavy genres like doom metal and Argent metal would provide a powerful and fitting score for intense vampire hunts.
leads.reason: The game's horror/hunter theme aligns strongly with the sound designer's atmospheric and punchy capabilities, while the heavy music style is a direct match for the game's likely tone.

leads.title: Bearly Alone
leads.author: Crimson Surge Games
leads.description: You get stalked by a bear while completing tasks
leads.pitch_sfx: His atmospheric and punchy sound design would excel at creating the terrifying presence of the bear and the visceral feedback for in-game tasks, enhancing the horror and immersion.
leads.pitch_music: His heavy metalcore and doom metal styles are a perfect fit for creating the oppressive and intense atmosphere needed to complement the constant threat of the bear.
leads.reason: This game's premise of being stalked by a bear directly aligns with the sound designer's strengths in creating atmospheric horror and impactful sound effects, and his heavy music style would greatly enhance the tension.

leads.title: LAZARUS
leads.author: Tacopix
leads.pitch_sfx: His expertise in brooding, tension-building atmospheric sound design perfectly complements the horror genre, while his punchy SFX capabilities can deliver the visceral impact needed for creature encounters and environmental interactions.
leads.pitch_music: The game's horror setting provides an ideal canvas for his heavy, doom-infused music to create a relentlessly oppressive and intense auditory experience.
leads.reason: This itch.io horror game offers a strong opportunity for the sound designer's atmospheric and punchy SFX skills, as well as his heavy music style, to create a compelling audio experience.

leads.title: NexoraApocalypse
leads.author: Projekt_U.E
leads.description: Defend a collapsing village, survive zombie waves, repair the fence, and face a raging boss.
leads.pitch_sfx: His ability to create brooding textures and tension-building soundscapes would perfectly complement the horror atmosphere of Nexora Apocalypse, while his punchy sound design can deliver satisfying impact for zombie encounters and boss fights.
leads.pitch_music: The heavy, doom-infused music styles he specializes in would be an ideal fit for the intense boss battles and desperate survival moments of a zombie apocalypse game.
leads.reason: This itch.io horror title directly aligns with the sound designer's atmospheric and punchy SFX capabilities, as well as his aptitude for heavy music fitting the game's core survival and boss fight mechanics.

leads.title: The Ouroboros Case
leads.author: MatRicDev
leads.pitch_sfx: His FromSoftware-style atmospheric sound design will perfectly complement the brooding horror of The Ouroboros Case, while his punchy SFX can bring satisfying impact to player interactions.
leads.pitch_music: The Ouroboros Case's horror themes would benefit immensely from the dark, heavy, and tension-building music styles like doom metal and Thall that he specializes in.
leads.reason: This is a strong lead because the game's horror genre aligns perfectly with the sound designer's atmospheric and heavy music specialties.

leads.author: minhmacg
leads.description: A short Vietnamese cozy horror games
leads.pitch_sfx: His atmospheric and punchy sound design can create the immersive and tense soundscape essential for a cozy horror experience, along with satisfying UI and interaction feedback.
leads.pitch_music: While the game leans towards cozy horror, his ability to craft brooding and tension-building textures, even in a heavy music context, could translate to unsettling ambient music that enhances the horror elements without overwhelming the cozy feel.
leads.reason: The game is a cozy horror which could benefit from atmospheric and punchy SFX, but the emphasis on 'cozy' might mean his heavy music style is less of a direct fit unless adapted to more ambient horror textures.

leads.title: Carry The Light
leads.author: Vermilion_R3d
leads.pitch_sfx: The game's horror theme and potential for impactful moments would benefit from his ability to create brooding textures and punchy, physical SFX.
leads.pitch_music: While not explicitly metal, the dark and atmospheric nature of a horror game could potentially integrate his heavy and doom metal influences for moments of intense dread or action.
leads.reason: This horror game on itch.io presents a potential opportunity for atmospheric and impactful sound design, with a moderate chance of incorporating his heavier music style for specific moments.

leads.title: The advent of content
leads.author: ApeHardware
leads.description: IF SLOP IS GOD, THEN BLASPHEMY IS SALVATION.â
leads.pitch_sfx: The game's emphasis on intense, potentially visceral horror suggests a strong need for punchy, impactful sound effects that convey weight and impact.
leads.pitch_music: The 'blasphemy is salvation' tagline and the horror genre hint at a potential opening for the composer's heavy, abrasive metal styles to amplify the game's oppressive atmosphere.
leads.reason: The game's edgy, horror-centric theme provides an opportunity for both atmospheric and punchy sound design, as well as heavy music, but the developer's indie status and lack of explicit hiring for audio make it a moderate priority.

leads.title: Dream Cleaner
leads.author: OverCookedWalrus
leads.description: A short game about picking up trash.
leads.pitch_sfx: His ability to create brooding textures and haunting ambience could elevate the unsettling atmosphere of a horror game, even with simple actions like picking up trash.
leads.reason: While the horror tag suggests a need for atmospheric sound design, the core gameplay of picking up trash is unlikely to require heavy music or punchy SFX, making it a low priority lead.
